prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GRNSIFTINGPAN-6IN-VAR Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6 Inch Mini Gold Prospecting Sifting Pan 4 Holes Per Square Inch Description: The ASR Outdoor 8pc Mini Classifier Sifting Screen Set are a must-have for gold prospecting, gold mining and mineral recovery.

Utilizing our high-impact classifier screen sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting by reducing down your material into a manageable size. The Gold Rush Prospectors Mini Classifier Sifting Screen Set will aid in your recovery efforts by sorting your raw material quickly and efficiently.

Available in 8 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, you can piece-meal your own set together or purchase the complete set, ensuring you have the right tools at your disposal in order to be able to properly sift and separate your material.

These sand and gravel screens are made of tough, high-impact plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh. Since each classifier is only 6" in diameter, it's great for beginners, stores easily and is stackable.

Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or classifying material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost.

In addition, looking through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold.

Soil Screen Sieve Sizes: 4 holes/Inch, 10 holes/inch, 20 holes/inch, 30 holes/inch, 40 holes/inch, 50 holes/inch, 60 holes/inch, 100 holes/inch. Search Terms: gold prospecting sediment sorting geology classifier screen for home garden worm soil compost sifter mineral pay dirt collection Features: - HIGH IMPACT PLASTIC: Classifier screens are made with high-quality ABS plastic formed around the stainless steel wire mesh ensuring that they can be used frequently in the field - STACKABLE CLASSIFIER DESIGN: Combine classifier screens on top of each other to sift larger material away incrementally and strategically - LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: Classifier screens are made from ABS Plastic; 304 stainless steel wire mesh screen; easy to carry with you - OVERALL DIAMETER: 6 inches; ideal classifier screen for small gold panning operations and day trips - Ideal for gold prospecting, gem collecting, garden soil separation, classifying material, educational and government science projects; ideal size for small panning operations and day trips === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6 Inch Mini Gold Prospecting Sifting Pan

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-in Mini Gold Prospecting Sifting Pan

anthropic.title_differentiation: 8-Piece Set, Stackable Classifier, 304 Stainless Steel Mesh, High-Impact Plastic, Gold Mining And Mineral Recovery

openai.title_differentiation: High Impact ABS Plastic, 304 Stainless Steel Mesh, Stackable, 6 Inch Diameter, 4 Holes Per Inch, Lightweight, Durable
